metadata.significance: Condemns cheating in business and describes the record books

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ

translations.en_sahih: Woe to those who give less [than due],
translations.en_yusufali: Woe to those that deal in fraud,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecelakaan besar bagi orang-orang yang curang (dalam timbangan dan sukatan),

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena itha iktaloo AAala alnnasi yastawfoona

translations.en_sahih: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.
translations.en_yusufali: Those who, when they have to receive by measure from men, exact full measure,
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu mereka yang apabila menerima sukatan (gantang cupak) dari orang lain mereka mengambilnya dengan cukup,

translations.en_sahih: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
translations.en_yusufali: But when they have to give by measure or weight to men, give less than due.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebaliknya) apabila mereka menyukat atau menimbang untuk orang lain, mereka kurangi.

translations.en_sahih: Do they not think that they will be resurrected
translations.en_yusufali: Do they not think that they will be called to account?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah mereka menyangka bahawa mereka akan dibangkitkan (hidup semula sesudah mati)?

translations.en_sahih: For a tremendous Day -
translations.en_yusufali: On a Mighty Day,
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari (kiamat) yang amat besar (huru-haranya),

translations.en_sahih: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?
translations.en_yusufali: A Day when (all) mankind will stand before the Lord of the Worlds?
translations.ms_basmeih: Hari berdiri manusia untuk mengadap Tuhan sekalian alam?

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla inna kitaba alfujjari lafee sijjeenin

translations.en_sahih: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay! Surely the record of the wicked is (preserved) in Sijjin.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak sepatutnya (mereka melakukan perbuatan yang salah itu dan melalaikan hari akhirat)! Sesungguhnya "kitab suratan amal" orang-orang yang berdosa itu (didaftarkan) dalam "Sijjiin".

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee what Sijjin is?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui: apa dia "Sijjiin" itu,

translations.en_sahih: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.
translations.en_yusufali: (There is) a Register (fully) inscribed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ialah (tempat simpanan) kitab catitan yang jelas nyata, (yang menghimpunkan amalan orang-orang yang berdosa).

translations.en_sahih: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,
translations.en_yusufali: Woe, that Day, to those that deny-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecelakaan besar, pada hari itu, bagi orang-orang yang mendustakan -

translations.en_sahih: Who deny the Day of Recompense.
translations.en_yusufali: Those that deny the Day of Judgment.
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu mereka yang mendustakan hari pembalasan.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama yukaththibu bihi illa kullu muAAtadin atheemin

translations.en_sahih: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.
translations.en_yusufali: And none can deny it but the Transgressor beyond bounds the Sinner!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiada yang mendustakannya melainkan tiap-tiap orang yang melampaui batas (kebenaran), lagi amat derhaka!

ayahs.arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Itha tutla AAalayhi ayatuna qala asateeru alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
translations.en_yusufali: When Our Signs are rehearsed to him, he says, "Tales of the ancients!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sehingga) apabila ia dibacakan kepadanya ayat-ayat Kami, ia berkata:" Ini ialah dongeng orang-orang dahulu kala!"

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla bal rana AAala quloobihim ma kanoo yaksiboona

translations.en_sahih: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.
translations.en_yusufali: By no means! but on their hearts is the stain of the (ill) which they do!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebenarnya! (Ayat-ayat Kami itu tidak ada cacatnya) bahkan mata hati mereka telah diselaputi kekotoran (dosa), dengan sebab (perbuatan kufur dan maksiat) yang mereka kerjakan.

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla innahum AAan rabbihim yawmaithin lamahjooboona

translations.en_sahih: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, from (the Light of) their Lord, that Day, will they be veiled.
translations.ms_basmeih: Jangan lagi mereka berlaku demikian! (kalau tidak), mereka pada hari itu, tetap terdinding dari (rahmat) Tuhannya.

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.
translations.en_yusufali: Further, they will enter the Fire of Hell.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, sesungguhnya mereka akan menderita bakaran neraka.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma yuqalu hatha allathee kuntum bihi tukaththiboona

translations.en_sahih: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."
translations.en_yusufali: Further, it will be said to them: "This is the (reality) which ye rejected as false!
translations.ms_basmeih: Akhirnya dikatakan (kepada mereka): "Inilah dia (azab seksa) yang kamu dustakan dahulu."

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla inna kitaba alabrari lafee AAilliyyeena

translations.en_sahih: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in 'illiyyun.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, verily the record of the Righteous is (preserved) in 'Illiyin.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ingatlah wahai manusia! Sesungguhnya "kitab suratan amal" orang-orang yang berbakti (dengan taat dan amal kebajikan), adalah (didaftarkan) dalam" Illiyiin".

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is 'illiyyun?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee what 'Illiyun is?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui, apa dia "Illiyiin" itu?

translations.en_sahih: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
translations.en_yusufali: (There is) a Register (fully) inscribed,
translations.ms_basmeih: Ialah (tempat simpanan) kitab catitan yang jelas nyata,

translations.en_sahih: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].
translations.en_yusufali: To which bear witness those Nearest (to Allah).
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang disaksikan oleh sekumpulan malaikat, yang didampingkan Tuhan di sisinya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
translations.en_yusufali: Truly the Righteous will be in Bliss:
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berbakti (dengan taat dan amal kebajikan), tetap berada di dalam Syurga yang penuh nikmat:

translations.en_sahih: On adorned couches, observing.
translations.en_yusufali: On Thrones (of Dignity) will they command a sight (of all things):
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berehat di atas pelamin-pelamin (yang berhias), sambil melihat (segala keindahan dan kemuliaan yang disediakan untuk mereka di situ).

translations.en_sahih: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.
translations.en_yusufali: Thou wilt recognise in their faces the beaming brightness of Bliss.
translations.ms_basmeih: Engkau dapat melihat pada muka mereka: cahaya nikmat yang mereka perolehi.

translations.en_sahih: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.
translations.en_yusufali: Their thirst will be slaked with Pure Wine sealed:
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka diberi minum dari satu minuman yang termeterai bekasnya,

ayahs.arabic: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Khitamuhu miskun wafee thalika falyatanafasi almutanafisoona

translations.en_sahih: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
translations.en_yusufali: The seal thereof will be Musk: And for this let those aspire, who have aspirations:
translations.ms_basmeih: Meterainya kasturi; - dan untuk (memperolehi nikmat kesenangan) itu hendaknya berlumba-lumba mereka yang ingin merebut kelebihan dan kesenangan;

translations.en_sahih: And its mixture is of Tasneem,
translations.en_yusufali: With it will be (given) a mixture of Tasnim:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan campuran minuman itu adalah dari "Tasnim":

translations.en_sahih: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.
translations.en_yusufali: A spring, from (the waters) whereof drink those Nearest to Allah.
translations.ms_basmeih: laitu matair yang diminum daripadanya oleh orang-orang yang di dampingkan (Tuhan di sisiNya).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena ajramoo kanoo mina allatheena amanoo yadhakoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
translations.en_yusufali: Those in sin used to laugh at those who believed,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang derhaka, mereka selalu tertawakan orang-orang yang beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances.
translations.en_yusufali: And whenever they passed by them, used to wink at each other (in mockery);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila orang-orang yang beriman lalu dekat mereka, mereka mengerling dan memejam celikkan mata sesama sendiri (mencemuhnya).

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waitha inqalaboo ila ahlihimu inqalaboo fakiheena

translations.en_sahih: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting.
translations.en_yusufali: And when they returned to their own people, they would return jesting;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila mereka kembali kepada kaum keluarganya, mereka kembali dengan riang gembira;

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waitha raawhum qaloo inna haolai ladalloona

translations.en_sahih: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost."
translations.en_yusufali: And whenever they saw them, they would say, "Behold! These are the people truly astray!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila mereka melihat orang-orang yang beriman, mereka berkata: "Sesungguhnya orang-orang itu adalah golongan yang sesat!"

translations.en_sahih: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.
translations.en_yusufali: But they had not been sent as keepers over them!
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hal mereka tidak diutus untuk menjaga sesat atau tidaknya orang-orang yang beriman itu!

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faalyawma allatheena amanoo mina alkuffari yadhakoona

translations.en_sahih: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,
translations.en_yusufali: But on this Day the Believers will laugh at the Unbelievers:
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka pada hari ini, orang-orang yang beriman pula tertawakan orang yang kafir itu.

translations.en_sahih: On adorned couches, observing.
translations.en_yusufali: On Thrones (of Dignity) they will command (a sight) (of all things).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sambil mereka berehat di atas pelamin-pelamin (yang berhias), serta melihat (hal yang berlaku kepada musuhnya).

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal thuwwiba alkuffaru ma kanoo yafAAaloona

translations.en_sahih: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do?
translations.en_yusufali: Will not the Unbelievers have been paid back for what they did?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Untuk menambahkan kegembiraan mereka, mereka ditanya): "Bukankah orang-orang yang kafir itu telah dibalas akan apa yang mereka telah kerjakan dahulu?"
